hero.headline: Private Hire Airport Transfers in London and across UK
hero.paragraph: Comfortable, reliable and stress-free travel to and from all major London airports, hotels, cruises, city or long-distance journeys.
hero.subparagraph: Fixed fares, professional and fully licensed (TFL) drivers, 24/7 service.

pcoStrip.badge: We are a fully licensed Private hire operator authorised by Transport of London (TFL), operating in full compliance with all regulatory requirements.
pcoStrip.licenceLine: Our Private Hire Operator License number is: 1234567, issued by Transport of London.

testimonials.quote: On time, clean car, great driver.
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: From airport pickups to hourly hire — we cover it.

items.title: Door to door
items.description: Reliable door-to-door transfers anywhere in London and surrounding areas.
items.fullDescription: Our door-to-door service provides convenient private transport directly from your pickup location to your destination. Whether you are travelling to work, visiting family, attending an event or heading to a hotel, our professional drivers ensure a comfortable, safe and punctual journey every time.

items.title: Airport transfers
items.description: Stress-free transfers to and from all major London airports.
items.fullDescription: We provide reliable airport transfer services to Heathrow, Gatwick, Stansted, Luton and London City Airport. Our drivers monitor flight arrivals in real time to ensure timely pickups, even if your flight is delayed. Enjoy a smooth and comfortable journey with professional drivers and clean, modern vehicles.

items.title: Cruise & port transfers
items.description: Direct private transfers between airports and cruise terminals.
items.fullDescription: Travelling to or from a cruise terminal? We offer comfortable transfers between all London airports and major UK cruise ports including Southampton, Dover, Portsmouth and Tilbury London cruise terminal. Our spacious vehicles accommodate luggage easily and ensure a relaxed journey before or after your cruise.

items.title: Chauffeur service
items.description: Flexible hourly chauffeur service for business or personal travel.
items.fullDescription: Our hourly hire service gives you the flexibility to keep a vehicle and driver at your disposal for as long as you need. Ideal for business meetings, shopping trips, city tours or special occasions, this service offers convenience, comfort and complete flexibility throughout your journey.

items.title: Group transfers
items.description: Comfortable transport for families, friends and larger groups.
items.fullDescription: Travelling with a group? Our spacious minivans and larger vehicles make group transfers easy and comfortable. Whether it's airport travel, events, business trips or family holidays, we ensure everyone travels together safely with plenty of room for luggage.

items.title: Private transfers
items.description: Exclusive private transport with professional drivers.
items.fullDescription: Our private transfer service offers discreet, comfortable and reliable transportation tailored to your schedule. Whether you require budget, executive travel or a luxury journey across London and UK, we provide a premium travel experience with professional drivers and high-quality vehicles.

items.title: EU trip
items.description: Reliable private hire travel from London to destinations across Europe.
items.fullDescription: Reliable private hire travel from London to destinations across Europe. Comfortable vehicles, professional drivers. For EU trip please send us details via email info@britlinetransfers.co.uk or WhatsApp button.

about.title: Who we are
about.description: Britline Transfers is a London-based private hire company providing professional airport transfers and private transport services across London and the UK.
about.paragraph1: Britline Transfers is a London-based private hire company providing professional airport transfers and private transport services across London and the UK. Our mission is to deliver safe, reliable and comfortable travel for tourists, individuals, families and business clients.
about.paragraph2: We combine professional drivers, modern vehicles and excellent customer service to ensure every journey is smooth and stress-free.

features.title: Reliable airport pickups with flight tracking

items.question: Do you do airport pickups?
items.answer: Yes. We cover all major London airports including Heathrow, Gatwick, Luton, Stansted and Southend airport

items.question: Do you operate 24/7?
items.answer: Yes, our services operate 24 hours a day, 7 days a week including holidays.

items.question: Do you monitor flight arrivals?
items.answer: Yes. We track your flight in real time to ensure your driver arrives at the correct time.

items.question: How do I book a transfer?
items.answer: You can book online, via WhatsApp, by phone, or by email.

items.question: What happens if my flight is delayed?
items.answer: We monitor your flight and adjust the pickup time accordingly at no extra charge.Just keep your phone ON

items.question: Can I request a child seat?
items.answer: Yes, child seats are available upon request when booking.

items.question: Do you offer fixed prices?
items.answer: Yes. All our transfers are provided with fixed transparent pricing.

items.question: How do I pay for the service?
items.answer: Payments can be made online or by card depending on your booking method.

items.question: Where to meet the driver?
items.answer: You will receive confirmation email with all details and meeting point.

items.question: How do I recognise my driver at airport?
items.answer: Your driver will wait at agreed meeting point with name board or tablet display your name.

items.question: Can I cancel my booking?
items.answer: Yes. Please see our cancellation policy for full details.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Call, message or email — we're here to help.

footerCta.description: Fixed price airport transfer — Heathrow, Gatwick and more. Get a quote or book now. Available 24/7.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.body:
Prices & Pickup Readiness
Prices are confirmed at the time of booking and assume passengers are ready to travel at the agreed pickup time.

Phone Bookings & Confirmations
Phone bookings are handled carefully and accurately, and confirmations are sent by email and text.

Journey Reminders & Driver Details
Before every journey, we send helpful reminders with driver name, vehicle details, and contact information. This provides peace of mind, improves communication, and ensures a smooth pickup. Also, if it is airports pick up the exact meeting location will be send with the confirmation email.

Payments
Payments can be made securely by debit or credit card or via secure pay-by-link.

Waiting Time - Home & Hotel Pickups
For home or hotel pickups, 15 minutes of complimentary waiting time is included. After this, a minimum charge of £5 applies for up to 12 minutes, then 40p per minute after that.

Waiting Time - Airport & Cruise Port Pickups
For airports and cruise ports, one hour of complimentary waiting time is included from confirmed landing or docking time plus any additional time selected during booking. After this, a minimum charge of £5 applies for up to 12 minutes, then 40p per minute thereafter.

Vehicle Size, Passengers & Luggage
Please ensure the vehicle type booked is suitable for your passenger numbers and luggage. If a larger vehicle is required or capacity is exceeded, additional charges may apply or a new booking may be required.

Additional Stops, Pickups & Drop-offs
Additional stops, pickups or drop-offs are charged per mile with a minimum fee of £8. We will always advise transparently where possible.

Cancellations & Refunds
Bookings may be cancelled or changed with a minimum of 24 hours notice. A small administration fee applies to prepaid cancellations.
Cancellations under 24 hours are non-refundable, including situations caused by missed or delayed travel. We recommend travel insurance where appropriate.

No-Shows
A no-show occurs if a passenger does not meet the Driver at the agreed time and location and no communication is made. This applies to home, hotel, private address or airport bookings.
Prepaid journeys are non-refundable in the event of a no-show.

Routes & Journey Decisions
Drivers will select routes with consideration for time, safety, road conditions and traffic. Passengers may request alternative routing where appropriate.

Delays & Circumstances Beyond Control
Travel times may occasionally be impacted by severe traffic, road closures or exceptional weather conditions. While the Driver is responsible for the transport service, we remain available to assist, communicate and help resolve concerns relating to bookings or journey support.

Peak Dates & Special Pricing
Prices may be higher during certain dates with limited Driver availability, including 24th, 25th, 26th, 31st December and 1st January.

Child Seats
Child seats are provided as a helpful courtesy when available. Suitability, correct installation, and usage remain at the passenger’s discretion. Please inform us of the child’s age when making your booking so we can provide a suitable child seat appropriate for their age.

Driver Allocation & Outsourcing
Our preferred approach is to fulfil journeys using our regular licensed Drivers. When demand is high or unforeseen issues occur, we may allocate your journey to another reputable and fully licensed Operator.
Whenever outsourcing is used, all Drivers remain licensed, insured and regulated, and your booking is monitored and supported by us throughout.

Customer Support & After-Journey Assistance
Our aim is to make every journey organised, comfortable, professional and stress-free. Britline Transfers remains your main point of contact for support, amendments, customer service and after-journey assistance.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body:
Britline Transfers respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal information. Any personal details collected during the booking process will only be used to process your booking and provide our services.

We do not share or sell customer information to third parties except where required by law.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.body:
Cancellations & Refunds
Bookings may be cancelled or changed with a minimum of 24 hours’ notice. A small administration fee applies to prepaid cancellations.

Cancellations under 24 hours are non-refundable, including situations caused by missed or delayed travel. We recommend travel insurance where appropriate.

No-Shows
A no-show occurs if a passenger does not meet the Driver at the agreed time and location and no communication is made. This applies to home, hotel, private address or airport bookings.
Prepaid journeys are non-refundable in the event of a no-show.
